DPA4 Mini 不确定度-误差相关性测试看板

实验对象为 4-member DPA4 Mini ensemble。训练池为 practices/sampled_dpdata，候选池为带 DFT 标签的 practices/other_dpdata。报告生成时间：2026-06-13 23:36:19。

实验规模与验收状态

训练池
511
systems, 3,000 frames
候选池
617
systems, 27,656 frames
合并帧表
27,656
frame-level rows
Energy ensemble
8
members, shape (27656, 8)

Type map: C, Fe, H, O. 训练池与候选池 system name overlap: 391; 本实验解释为“已有训练池 vs 待选候选池”，未做 frame-level 去重。

关键结论

Force UQ 主结论

force 不确定度与真实 force 误差呈强正相关。最佳主比较为 RND force deviation, rescaled vs Frame max force error，Spearman = 0.780，Pearson = 0.743。

Energy UQ 主结论

LLPR/DPOSE energy UQ 与 energy error per atom 的相关性为弱正相关。最佳 energy 主比较为 LLPR energy per atom，Spearman = 0.125。

应用建议

本数据集上优先用 QbC/RND 做 force-error 样本筛选；LLPR/DPOSE 更适合补充 energy-risk 视角。force DPOSE 未评估，因为当前 detached-feature 实现只支持 energy-level LLPR/DPOSE。

Parity/Correlation 统计与高误差召回

下表把不确定度值与预测-真值误差逐帧配对，报告 Pearson、Spearman、Kendall。高误差召回使用误差 top 5% 作为 high-error 样本，并统计不确定度 top 5% 的召回与 enrichment。

RoleUQ metricError targetPearson rSpearman rhoKendall tauN framesTop 5% recallTop 5% enrichmentInterpretation
PrimaryQbC force ensembleFrame max force error0.7160.7690.57727,65654.0%10.80QbC force ensemble vs Frame max force error: strong positive rank relation (Spearman 0.769, Pearson 0.716).
PrimaryQbC force ensembleFrame RMS force error0.6660.7340.54327,65655.2%11.03QbC force ensemble vs Frame RMS force error: strong positive rank relation (Spearman 0.734, Pearson 0.666).
PrimaryRND force deviationFrame max force error0.7430.7800.58727,65656.0%11.21RND force deviation vs Frame max force error: strong positive rank relation (Spearman 0.780, Pearson 0.743).
PrimaryRND force deviationFrame RMS force error0.7000.7370.54627,65655.6%11.12RND force deviation vs Frame RMS force error: strong positive rank relation (Spearman 0.737, Pearson 0.700).
PrimaryRND force deviation, rescaledFrame max force error0.7430.7800.58727,65656.0%11.21RND force deviation, rescaled vs Frame max force error: strong positive rank relation (Spearman 0.780, Pearson 0.743).
PrimaryRND force deviation, rescaledFrame RMS force error0.7000.7370.54627,65655.6%11.12RND force deviation, rescaled vs Frame RMS force error: strong positive rank relation (Spearman 0.737, Pearson 0.700).
PrimaryLLPR energy per atomAbs energy error per atom0.1330.1250.08327,65610.2%2.04LLPR energy per atom vs Abs energy error per atom: very weak positive rank relation (Spearman 0.125, Pearson 0.133).
PrimaryDPOSE energy ensemble std per atomAbs energy error per atom0.1180.1240.08227,6568.5%1.71DPOSE energy ensemble std per atom vs Abs energy error per atom: very weak positive rank relation (Spearman 0.124, Pearson 0.118).

ExploratoryDPOSE energy ensemble std per atomFrame max force error-0.118-0.388-0.26527,6568.5%1.71DPOSE energy ensemble std per atom vs Frame max force error: weak negative rank relation (Spearman -0.388, Pearson -0.118).

误差与不确定度分布

分布统计用于判断 UQ 数值尺度和误差目标是否存在极端值主导。相关性计算已按 metric pair 去除 NaN/inf。

tangent_lo 双维度划分与 force error

本节按 DP-EVA UQFilter(scheme="tangent_lo") 的实现，在 uq_qbc_for 与 uq_rnd_rescaled 平面上重新划分 accurate、candidate 和 failed。阈值为 auto-derived tangent_lo：QbC [0.1201, 0.3701]，RND-rescaled [0.1201, 0.3701]；默认 ratio=0.33、width=0.25。

IdentityError targetFramesFrame shareHigh-error rateHigh-error recallEnrichmentMedian errorP95 errorMax error
accurateFrame max force error22,95383.0%0.5%8.6%0.100.33480.64121.7877
candidateFrame max force error4,47116.2%24.5%79.2%4.900.66731.56743.1790
failedFrame max force error2320.8%72.4%12.1%14.481.34933.37499.0385
accurateFrame RMS force error22,95383.0%0.4%6.4%0.080.15930.26960.6010
candidateFrame RMS force error4,47116.2%25.2%81.5%5.040.26640.57921.1025
failedFrame RMS force error2320.8%72.4%12.1%14.480.47640.88382.7899

解释：tangent_lo 是 QbC/RND-rescaled 双维度几何筛选，不是单一排序指标。candidate 区用于正常采样，failed 区表示超出高阈值的极高不确定度结构；二者与真实 high-force-error 的富集程度可用于检查 DP-EVA collect 策略是否对 force risk 敏感。

计算效率

GPU 阶段的耗时来自 Slurm sacct 主 job 行。GPU-minutes = elapsed minutes x allocated GPUs。CPU 后处理包括 QbC/RND 表合并、LLPR/DPOSE 汇总、相关性和图表生成，主要是读取已有输出文件，未进入 Slurm 计费统计。

UQ 方法级效率比较

下表把 QbC/RND、LLPR analytic 和 DPOSE energy ensemble 的边际计算成本拆开。训练 4 个模型是本实验 ensemble 前置成本；如果只评估已有模型上的 UQ，主要差别来自多模型 candidate inference 与 last-layer feature extraction。

UQ methodRequired computationObserved GPU costObserved critical pathNotes
QbC/RND force UQ4 model inference on candidate pool; force UQ comes from committee force spread and baseline-vs-committee deviation.7.5 GPU-min1.9 minRequires trained ensemble; no feature extraction needed for UQ after inference.
LLPR analytic energy UQTrain and candidate fitting-last-layer feature extraction, then CPU Cholesky/linear algebra.2.8 GPU-min2.3 min feature critical pathCPU postprocess was lightweight and not charged by Slurm; output is analytic energy uncertainty.
DPOSE energy ensemble UQLLPR feature pipeline plus model-0 base energy and last-layer weight sampling.4.7 GPU-min2.3 min observed critical pathIncludes model-0 base energy reuse; energy ensemble shape (27656, 8).

方法可推广度

MethodBest use in this experimentCompute cost profile推广条件与限制
QbC force ensemble筛选 force max/RMS 高误差样本；top 5% UQ 对 force high-error recall 约 54-55%。需要多个模型对候选池推理；本实验 4 个 1-GPU inference job，critical path 约 1.9 min。适合已有 ensemble 或可接受多模型推理成本的主动学习；相关性依赖成员多样性。
RND force deviation本实验 force 相关性最高；top 5% UQ 对 force high-error recall 约 56%。复用 ensemble inference 输出，额外后处理成本低。适合力主导的采样策略；rescaled 版本本次与原 RND 排序等价。
LLPR energy per atomenergy error per atom 为弱正相关；top 1% UQ 对 energy high-error enrichment 约 5.13。需要 train/candidate last-layer features 和 CPU 线性后验分析；feature GPU critical path 约 2.3 min。适合只需要 energy-level 风险或想降低 full ensemble 训练成本的场景；当前不覆盖 force DPOSE。
DPOSE energy ensemble std per atomenergy error per atom 为弱正相关；top 1% UQ enrichment 约 4.33。需要 last-layer features、base energy 和解析最后层权重；energy ensemble shape 为 (27656, 8)。可作为 energy-risk 补充信号；若候选体系分布变化大，需要重新校验校准性。

浅层系综方法比较与 LLPR/DPOSE 偏差解释

本实验中 QbC/RND 与真实 force error 强相关，而 LLPR/DPOSE energy uncertainty 与 energy error per atom 仅弱正相关；这与方法目标一致。当前 DP-EVA LLPR/DPOSE 是 energy-level LLPR/DPOSE：基于 detached fitting-last-layer feature 的 covariance/ensemble std，缺少从 ensemble energy 到 force 的可微传播路径，因此 LLPR/DPOSE vs force error 只能作为 exploratory。

MethodObserved signalShallow-ensemble meaningCost profileMain limitation
QbC force ensembleforce error 强相关；可直接支持 force-error 主动学习筛选。多个完整模型的 force 输出差异，不是 last-layer posterior。训练/推理多个模型；本实验 4-member ensemble。成员多样性不足时会低估风险。
RND force deviation本实验 force rank correlation 最高。baseline model 与 committee force 偏离。复用 ensemble 推理，后处理便宜。仍依赖完整模型 ensemble 输出。
DP-EVA fitting-network 后处理提供 energy-level 风险补充。frozen representation + fitting last-layer feature/weights。feature 导出 + 线性代数。当前 detached feature 不能推出 force DPOSE。
LLPR/DPOSE shallow ensembleenergy error 弱正相关，适合 energy-risk 和组合量传播。last-layer covariance / posterior sampled ensemble。比 full ensemble 低；可输出 energy ensemble。force uncertainty 需要可微 graph/Jacobian 或 force-aware 训练目标。

QbC/RND

直接比较 force 输出，因此和 force_error_max/force_error_rms 的目标一致。本数据集上它们是 force-risk 筛选的主信号。

LLPR/DPOSE

当前输出的是 energy-level 后验和 energy ensemble std。弱 energy 相关性说明它有补充价值，但不能替代 force-aware UQ。

文献语境

Atomistic Cookbook 和 metatrain 文档强调 LLPR/ensemble 可用于 uncertainty 和 derived quantities；DPOSE/浅层系综资料强调 last-layer ensemble 的低成本，同时 force uncertainty 需要 force-aware 或可微路径。

资料依据

  • Atomistic Cookbook PET-MAD UQ
  • metatrain LLPR
  • DPOSE shallow ensemble

详细文字版分析见 outputs/uq_method_deep_dive.md。Force DPOSE is not evaluated because current detached-feature implementation only supports energy-level DPOSE/LLPR.

诊断图

每组比较包含 scatter、hexbin 和 uncertainty-rank error curve。Primary 图用于主结论；LLPR/DPOSE vs force 图仅作 exploratory，不作为 force DPOSE 结论。
